title: What does a car need to move?
intro: A car needs a body, power, energy, turning, rolling, and stopping parts to work safely.

steps.title: Start with the body
steps.explanation: The chassis is the strong base that holds the car together.

steps.title: Wake the car up
steps.explanation: The battery helps the car start and powers basic electrical systems.

steps.title: Make power
steps.explanation: The engine uses energy and creates the power that can move the car.

steps.title: Carry energy
steps.explanation: The fuel tank stores fuel so the engine can keep running.

steps.title: Keep it cool
steps.explanation: The radiator helps stop the engine from overheating.

steps.title: Roll forward
steps.explanation: Wheels let the car roll and carry its weight.

steps.title: Turn safely
steps.explanation: Steering helps the driver point the car in the right direction.

steps.title: Stop safely
steps.explanation: Brakes slow the car down and stop it safely.

title: How do features improve the car?
intro: After the car can move, we can add comfort, safety, and smarter driving tools.

featureGroups.title: Comfort
featureGroups.explanation: Comfort parts make the ride nicer for people inside the car.

featureGroups.title: Safety
featureGroups.explanation: Safety parts help protect passengers and make the car easier to control.

featureGroups.title: Smart help
featureGroups.explanation: Assist parts help the driver see, park, and navigate better.

featureGroups.title: Better drive
featureGroups.explanation: Performance support parts can help the car drive smoother and more confidently.

title: What helps a car go farther and faster?
intro: Adventure cars need more grip, more carrying ability, and stronger systems for long trips.

featureGroups.title: Adventure grip
featureGroups.explanation: Adventure parts help the car handle rough roads and bumps.

featureGroups.title: Carry more
featureGroups.explanation: Carrying parts help the car bring extra gear on long trips.

featureGroups.title: See more
featureGroups.explanation: Lighting and trail tools help when the road is dark or tricky.

featureGroups.title: Go stronger
featureGroups.explanation: Strong performance parts help the car go harder for longer.
